message:
Add hash embedder as search fallback mechanism

Add hash-based embedding as a lightweight fallback for semantic search:
- hashEmbed(): Generate deterministic pseudo-embeddings from text
- Export from core/search for use in suggest command

This provides consistent similarity scoring without requiring
external embedding models, useful for environments where
full semantic search isn't available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
